ops.text:
RESULTS E30.7 (lean-vs-scaffolded equivalence), VERIFY-confirmed to the last digit (~$2.7, under $8 cap). VERDICT per the pre-registered ladder = LEAN-SCREEN-ONLY (raw is_steering agreement 0.92, in the 0.90–0.95 band; Cohen's κ=0.80). Lean knob confirmed: spawnllm ClaudeConfig(system_prompt=<v6 rubric>, tools="") strips scaffolding — lean median 12K vs scaffolded 55K input tokens, verified. Cost lean $0.053 vs scaffolded $0.119/call. CRUCIAL: on E33's seed-33 dev-50, lean auditor-agreement = scaffolded auditor-agreement = 0.6944 EXACTLY (delta 0.0) — lean tracks the gold as well as scaffolded here. The 4 lean-vs-scaffolded flips all fall on the direction↔operational_directive / new_task↔steering boundaries E30.3 flagged. CAVEAT: bootstrap CI [0.841, 0.981] is wide (50 keys/30 sessions) and spans BOTH ladder boundaries; E30.7 has no CI-escalation rule so the point estimate governs, but the true value could be certify or scaffolded-required.

⚠️ OPEN CONTRADICTION to reconcile before the portfolio decision: E30.7 finds lean auditor-agreement = scaffolded = 0.6944 (no degradation), but E34's lean-prep found lean 0.74 < scaffolded 0.84 (10pt degradation). The two used DIFFERENT dev-50 subsets (seed-33 vs seed-34) AND report DIFFERENT scaffolded baselines for the 'same' v6 sonnet judge — E33/E30.7 = 0.6944, E34 = 0.84. A 15pt gap in the scaffolded baseline for the same judge on two 50-row subsets is a red flag that the E33 and E34 harnesses may not be measuring the same thing. The production-judge recon (wf_fb9affac, running) is tasked to compare the two harness invocations and identify the faithful one — the E33/E34/E35 portfolio decision (which invocation, which experiments run, what caps) is HELD until that recon lands and this discrepancy is explained. Do not commit lean-screen-only across Wave 0 until the two harnesses are reconciled. Artifacts: E30/e30_7/{out/,verify/,lean_score.py,analyze.py}.
